title: Daily Airport Shuttle Service
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Garden Route Shuttles offers...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Garden Route Shuttles offers reliable daily transfers to and from George Airport and Plettenberg Bay, connecting you to Knysna, Plettenberg Bay, Sedgefield and Wilderness.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Garden Route Shuttles offers reliable daily transfers to and from George Airport and Plettenberg Bay, connecting you to Knysna, Plettenberg Bay, Sedgefield and Wilderness."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Enjoy scheduled departures, door-to-door options, and comfortable, air-conditioned vehicles, all operated by professional drivers. Perfect for business travellers, tourists, and groups."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Book online today for a seamless, stress-free journey along the Garden Route! For more information, please visit www.gardenrouteshuttle.co.za/daily-airport-shuttle/","html":"Book online today for a seamless, stress-free journey along the Garden Route! For more information, please visit www.gardenrouteshuttle.co.za/daily-airport-shuttle/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Discounts for groups of 2 or moreOur daily shuttle service is the go-to choice for locals and visitors alike, thanks to its reputation for reliability and punc-tuality.","html":"Discounts for groups of 2 or more
Our daily shuttle service is the go-to choice for locals and visitors alike, thanks to its reputation for reliability and punc-tuality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pre-bookings essentialTo guarantee your seat on our daily shuttle service, pre-bookings are essential. Simply choose your desired pick-up and drop-off locations, select your preferred departure time, and let us take care of the rest.","html":"Pre-bookings essential
To guarantee your seat on our daily shuttle service, pre-bookings are essential. Simply choose your desired pick-up and drop-off locations, select your preferred departure time, and let us take care of the rest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route AppWith our Garden Route App we bring smart, safe and seamless transport to the Garden Route. The app is a new-generation travel platform designed specifically for the Garden Route region, offering residents, tourists, and businesses a reliable, cashless and easy-to-use transport solution.","html":"Garden Route App
With our Garden Route App we bring smart, safe and seamless transport to the Garden Route. The app is a new-generation travel platform designed specifically for the Garden Route region, offering residents, tourists, and businesses a reliable, cashless and easy-to-use transport solution."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Highlights:","html":"Highlights:"},{"type":"list","items":["Cashless payment system with secure online transactions","Advance booking and on-demand rides for flexibility and convenience","Fleet of professionally vetted drivers and vehicles","Specialised event transport for weddings, conferences, and tours","Corporate login for hotels and BnBs."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VisionThe Garden Route App aims to become the preferred transport platform along the Garden Route, supporting the region's residents, tourism economy, and event industries with smart, affordable, and scalable mobility solutions.","html":"Vision
The Garden Route App aims to become the preferred transport platform along the Garden Route, supporting the region's residents, tourism economy, and event industries with smart, affordable, and scalable mobility solutions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"AvailabilityThe Garden Route App is now available for download on Google Play and Apple App Store, with services operational across major towns in the region.","html":"Availability
The Garden Route App is now available for download on Google Play and Apple App Store, with services operational across major towns in the region."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, please visit www.gardenrouteshuttle.co.za/uber-service/","html":"For more information, please visit www.gardenrouteshuttle.co.za/uber-service/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
